text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

Your port www/geeklog uses a custom WWW_DIR location which is
deprecated. I modified your patch to use the default WWWDIR location.
Could you please review and approve the patch.

Thanks,
Beat
